examples: With all of your fierceness, come smash this foul enemy!
In spite of their fierceness the dogs are very kind to their masters and kids.
You cannot even begin to imagine the fierceness of their plans for you ones.
The fierceness came home to me in Xian when we went to see the warriors.
The sun burns down so harshly that the contours of all visible items melt in its fierceness.
